detail_text: Freshness Guarantee 18 days of freshness guaranteed from the day it is delivered or you can request a refund. If you are not satisfied with this product in any way, please contact us and we'll give you a refund. Find out more about our freshness promise. Only Yakult contains L. casei strain Shirota, the unique probiotic strain specially developed by our founder, Dr. Minoru Shirota. Tasty and packed with probiotics goodness, no wonder Yakult is a favourite cultured milk drink consumed by people in 38 countries and regions around the world everyday.
